title: Ground Battle on Bespin
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Battle of Bespin}} {{Battle |prev=*[[Ground Battle on Dathomir]]''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]'' *[[Duel on Cloud City/Legends|Duel on Cloud City]] |conc=[[Occupation of Bespin]] |next=[[Battle over Coruscant]] |image=[[File:TheftOnBespin-FoC.jpg]] |name=Ground Battle on Bespin |conflict= |date=[[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]'' places this battle between the [[Occupation of Bespin]] and the [[Battle over Coruscant]], which are both set in 3 ABY according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''. |place=Bespin |result=[[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]] manages to steal tibanna gas |side1=Zann Consortium |side2=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] |side3= |side4= |commanders1=*[[Tyber Zann]] *[[Urai Fen]] *[[IG-88A/Legends|IG-88]] |commanders2=[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]{{KennerCite|set=Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (toy line)|pack=Darth Vader vs. Prince Xizor|link=soteKxizor-vader.asp}} |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |forces1=*[[Mercenary/Legends|Mercenary]] assault squads *Zann Consortium grenadiers *[[Droideka Mark II]]s *[[Mobile Defense Unit]]s *[[F9-TZ Transport]]s *[[MZ-8 Mobile Pulse Cannon]]s *[[Missile Attack Launcher]]s |forces2=*[[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtroopers]] *[[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|All Terrain Scout Transports]] *[[2-M Saber-class repulsor tank/Legends|2-M Saber-class repulsor tanks]] *1 [[HAVt B5 Juggernaut|HAVT B5 Juggernaut transport]] *3 Phase III Dark Troopers *6 Dark Side Adepts *1 [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] *1 Imperial Field Commander |forces3= |forces4= |casual1=Minor to Moderate |casual2=*All stormtroopers *All AT-ST's *All 2-M tanks *All Dark Troopers *All Dark Side Adepts *Field Commander later killed by Darth Vader |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|It seems I misjudged you, Zann. Stealing that Tibanna gas from Vader must have been very difficult.|[[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor]]|}} The '''Ground Battle on Bespin''' occurred when [[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor]] contracted fellow [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Tyber Zann]] to steal [[Tibanna/Legends|tibanna]] gas on [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]] from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Sensing a trap, Zann formulated a plan to get rid of Xizor while keeping the tibanna gas for himself by planting evidence in the computer systems pointing to [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]]. ==Prelude== {{Quote|Of course, but Xizor's made the mistake of setting his trap on the planet Bespin. That world is under the personal control of Darth Vader.|[[Tyber Zann]]|}} Not long after the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[occupation of Bespin]] began, the [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]] took on a job from [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] to steal [[Tibanna/Legends|tibanna]] gas from [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]] in return for the latter party arranging a meeting with [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], or one of his [[Envoy/Legends|envoys]]. Believing it to be a trap, [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Tyber Zann]] planned to leave evidence that would point the [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial forces]]' [[Supreme Commander (Galactic Empire)/Legends|Supreme Commander]], [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], into the [[Underlord]] [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor's]] direction. Thus, Zann hired the [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droid]] [[IG-88A/Legends|IG-88]] prior to the raid in order to slice [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] computers of Bespin central server cluster. ==The battle== ===The theft=== {{Quote|We don't have much time. I'll plant the evidence against Xizor. Urai, see to the Tibanna Gas. IG-88, slice into the Imperial computer banks and get me security access for all of the planets on my hit list.|Tyber Zann|}} When Tyber Zann, his [[Bodyguard/Legends|bodyguard]] [[Urai Fen]] and IG-88 landed on a Bespin platform, the trio were greeted by two [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]]. Urai sneaked up behind a [[Unidentified stormtrooper (Bespin)|stormtrooper]] and killed him, and Tyber shot the other. The Zann Consortium's troops, soon arrived and were given a task. Zann's soldiers killed the stormtrooper guards and destroyed the patrolling [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-ST's]] as Urai led five [[Mustafar panning droid|collector droids]] to collect the gas. Meanwhile, Tyber Zann planted evidence at four security outposts would incriminate Xizor, as IG-88A sliced into the Imperial database and gained the information on Tyber's so-called hit list. ===Darth Vader's intervention=== {{Quote|Sir, a group of smugglers have infiltrated our Tibanna gas refinery."
"You have, of course, captured and detained them?"
"My Lord, we nearly had them, but they seem to have…[choke]"
"Not the performance I expect from an Imperial Field Commander. I will seek them out myself.|An Imperial Field Commander and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]|}} Shortly after the successful completion of the mission the forces were leaving when [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] Vader himself landed on the Bespin platform, with several [[Dark side adept/Legends|Dark Side Adepts]] standing by. The [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborg]] then [[Telekinesis/Legends#Force Choke|killed]] the Field Commander for not preventing the theft of the tibanna gas. Knowing his forces were no match for Vader, and that he needed them to find the evidence that framed Xizor, Zann and his forces quickly retreated to the landing zone for pickup. ==Aftermath== {{Quote|They escaped with a large supply of Tibanna gas, enough to supply a sizable fleet."
"Have they been identified?"
"We've found evidence that suggests the Black Sun criminal organization was responsible. We also have records that indicate some of the local militia took bribes to allow them to land."
"Execute the local militia and any associates. Xizor will pay for this transgression.|A stormtrooper and Darth Vader|}} From the evidence planted on the platform the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] was convinced that it was the Black Sun's Underlord who had orchestrated the crime. Tyber Zann made a large amount of [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] from selling part of the tibanna gas on the [[Black market/Legends|black market]], and he kept part of the gas to power his [[Vengeance-class frigate|own]] [[Aggressor-class destroyer|ships]]. Eventually [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] contacted Tyber sometime after the battle revealing that while the evidence he planted had convinced Lord Vader of [[Prince/Legends|Prince]] Xizor's guilt, he noticed the unique signature on it. Rather than telling his superior, the [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] [[Commander/Legends|commander]] allowed the [[Falleen/Legends|Falleen]] [[Gangster/Legends|gangster]] to be [[Battle over Coruscant|killed]]. ==Behind the scenes== It is possible to kill Darth Vader and his Adepts after he lands by simply swarming the area in front of the landing zone with units and targeting them. Early in the mission, a reference to a scene in [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']] is made when a stormtrooper asks for Zann's identification, to which Zann responds that the stormtrooper "doesn't need to see" his identification. The stormtrooper then says "this one thinks he's a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]". The player may also bring the heroes [[Bossk/Legends|Bossk]] and [[Silri]] to the mission, though they are not required. This is the only story mission in the campaign where all five Consortium heroes may be used. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]'' ==Sources== *[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption Expansion: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption Expansion'': Prima Official Game Guide]] {{1stID|Ground Battle on Bespin}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Mission von Bespin (Aufstieg des Zann-Konsortiums) |es=Batalla Terrestre en Bespin }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Bespin, Ground Battle on}} [[Category:Battles of Bespin]] [[Category:Events of the Galactic Civil War]] [[Category:Heists and robberies]]
